title: The 'none' sentinel: declared no-test repos disable every test gate loudly
read_first: docs/history/no-test-repos context: decision 55b951e1 (bee decisions search --text no-test-repos)
action: Per no-test-repos D1/D2 (decision 55b951e1). ALL lib/CLI edits land in BOTH twins byte-identically. (1) state.mjs: export NO_TEST_SENTINEL='none' + isNoTestCommand(v) helper; normalizeCommands keeps 'none' as-is (it already keeps non-empty strings — just confirm + test). Helper isNoTestRepo(config): commands.verify or commands.test === 'none' (either declares; verify wins for messaging). (2) inject.mjs both twins: when commands.verify is 'none', the preamble replaces the CI-status-gate paragraph with exactly one loud line: 'Test gates disabled by repo declaration (commands.verify: none) — cells cap on diff-backed outcomes; re-enable by recording real commands.' When only test is none but verify real, keep verify paragraph and note the dev-loop skip. Update test_misc assertions; scripts/fixtures/preamble-golden.txt: regen via node scripts/test_compact_capsule.mjs --update-golden ONLY if the golden fixture's output actually changes (its fixture has real commands — expect byte-identical; verify and state which in the report). (3) bee.mjs both twins, handleWorktreeMerge: if resolved gate command is the sentinel, pass undefined so the existing verifySkipped loud-warning path fires — never spawn the literal string; test_worktree_cli gains a none-sentinel fixture asserting verifySkipped + loud warning. (4) cells.mjs both twins: cells add/update accept verify 'none' ONLY when isNoTestRepo(config) — refused otherwise with a message naming the sentinel rule; cells cap for a verify-none cell in a none repo: skips the passing-verify-result requirement, auto-records verification_evidence note 'no-test repo: verification waived by repo declaration (commands.verify: none)' and requires non-empty --files as usual; test_cli_cells covers accept-in-none-repo, refuse-in-real-repo, cap-with-waiver-note. Red-first evidence for each of the 3 behaviors. Then regen: onboard --apply, render_plugin, release_manifest --write, impact_registry --write.

truths: sentinel never executed as a shell command anywhere
every skip is one loud line, never silent
verify-none cells refused in repos with real commands
cap waiver note recorded verbatim in trace evidence
golden fixture verified (regenerated only if truly changed)

verify: node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_cli_cells.mjs && node scripts/test_worktree_cli.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_misc.mjs && node scripts/test_compact_capsule.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check && node scripts/ledger_parity.mjs --check && node scripts/impact_registry.mjs --check

trace.outcome: no-test-repos D1/D2 machinery: NO_TEST_SENTINEL='none' + isNoTestCommand/isNoTestRepo in state.mjs; inject.mjs preamble replaces the CI-status-gate paragraph with one loud line when commands.verify is the sentinel (and adds a dev-loop note when only commands.test is); handleWorktreeMerge maps the sentinel to undefined so verifySkipped fires instead of spawning it; cells add/update refuse the sentinel outside a declared no-test repo, cells cap waives the passing-verify requirement and auto-records the waiver note. All four twins byte-identical.
trace.verify_output: test_cli_cells: 28 passed, 0 failed; test_worktree_cli: 161/161 passed; test_misc: 108 passed, 0 failed; test_compact_capsule: 14 passed, 0 failed; test_lib_mirror: 4/4 passed (29 lib files + 11 hook files byte-identical); release_manifest --check: 503 file(s) match; ledger_parity --check: match; impact_registry --check: up to date
trace.verify_command: node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_cli_cells.mjs && node scripts/test_worktree_cli.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_misc.mjs && node scripts/test_compact_capsule.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check && node scripts/ledger_parity.mjs --check && node scripts/impact_registry.mjs --check
